description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has Climalite technology, short sleeves, and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Look cool while working out in this black T-shirt from adidas. The placement print gives an edgy vibe, while the Climalite fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long by drawing seat away from the skin. adidas ClimaLite features cotton yarns on the face and synthetic fibers inside that wick moisture from the skin to the fabrics surface for easy evaporation. Team it with tracks and performance shoes and train better and longer. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
